summary: Iteration 172: Tech Evidence Audit & Arbitration Grouping - All tests PASS. Backend: (1) GET /api/disputes/{id} returns tech_evidence_summary with video/gps/nlyt/checkin/qr sections, (2) GET /api/disputes/decisions/mine returns decisions with all required fields including financial_impact, (3) GET /api/admin/arbitration returns disputes with grouping fields, (4) GET /api/admin/arbitration/stats returns correct KPIs (escalated=0, awaiting=48, resolved=9, agreed=0), (5) All filter endpoints work (escalated/awaiting/resolved/agreed). Frontend: (1) /decisions page loads and shows decisions grouped by appointment with 'X decisions' badges, (2) /decisions/{id} detail page shows new 'Preuves factuelles' section with NLYT score/duration/sessions, (3) /decisions/{id} shows enriched 'Ce qui a ete declare' with opened_reason displayed, (4) /decisions/{id} shows evidence_submissions as list with type and date, (5) /admin/arbitration list page groups disputes by appointment (1 card = 1 RDV), (6) Each appointment card shows sub-rows with status badges, proof badges, and positions, (7) Stats KPI cards are clickable and filter correctly, (8) Filter label shows count of RDVs and disputes, (9) /admin/arbitration/{id} detail page works correctly (no regression).

backend.test_tech_evidence_summary_nlyt_structur: PASS - nlyt section has has_data, best_score, total_active_seconds, proof_level
backend.test_arbitration_stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns escalated_pending=0, awaiting_positions=48, total_resolved=9, total_agreed_by_parties=0
backend.test_arbitration_disputes_have_grouping_: PASS - Disputes have appointment_id, appointment_title, appointment_date, positions, etc.
backend.test_arbitration_detail_endpoint: PASS - Returns full detail with tech_dossier and declaration_summary
backend.test_dispute_detail_has_opened_reason: PASS - opened_reason field accessible in dispute detail
backend.test_dispute_detail_has_evidence_submiss: PASS - evidence_submissions is a list with evidence_type, submitted_at, is_mine
backend.test_dispute_detail_has_financial_contex: PASS - financial_context has penalty_amount, penalty_currency, compensation_amount

frontend.decisions_list_page_loads: PASS - /decisions page loads with grouped decisions

frontend.preuves_factuelles_section_displayed: PASS - 'Preuves factuelles' section shows NLYT score (52/100), duration (17 min), sessions (3)

frontend.admin_arbitration_filter_label: PASS - Filter label shows '(X RDVs, Y litiges)'
frontend.admin_arbitration_detail_works: PASS - /admin/arbitration/{id} detail page shows tech dossier with all participants
